name: eldoria-v2
description: Realm of Eldoria v2 - Phaser + Vite + Tiled educational RPG prototype.

scripts.check: npm run validate:visual-targets && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:pwa && npm run test:generated-surfaces
scripts.test:terrain-blend: node scripts/test-terrain-blend-compositor.mjs && node scripts/test-shoreline-terrain-blend.mjs && node scripts/test-terrain-transitions.mjs
scripts.test:asset-pipeline: node scripts/test-asset-pipeline.mjs && node scripts/test-paint-scatter.mjs && node scripts/test-perspective-trial.mjs && node scripts/test-farm-scatter-tileset.mjs
scripts.test:generated-surfaces: npm run generate:pwa-icons && npm run compose:terrain-proof && npm run compose:farm-scatter && npm run build:village-art && npm run test:village-art && git diff --exit-code -- public/icons public/assets/tilesets/farm-terrain-proof.png public/assets/tilesets/tile_farm_grass_scatter.png public/maps/farm.json assets/source/generated/tile_village_shop_wall assets/source/generated/tile_village_shop_door assets/source/generated/tile_village_shop_roof assets/manifests/tile_village_shop_wall.manifest.json assets/manifests/tile_village_shop_door.manifest.json assets/manifests/tile_village_shop_roof.manifest.json assets/manifests/tile_farm_grass_scatter.manifest.json assets/tilesets/tile_village_shop_wall.png assets/tilesets/tile_village_shop_door.png assets/tilesets/tile_village_shop_roof.png assets/tilesets/tile_farm_grass_scatter.png docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_wall_stone_base docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_wall_wood_trim docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_wall_window_lit docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_door_closed docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_door_highlighted docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_door_open_optional docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_roof_thatch_base docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_roof_thatch_moss docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_village_shop_roof_ridge docs/art-pipeline/review/village_top_gaps docs/visual-targets/farm_village_tile_targets.json
